candidate_promotion_criteria: p95_signed_net_move >= 0.12 in the same ratio unit as trajectory net
ranked_families.cost_fee_spread_guards: Reject buckets where max MFE <= median estimated_cost or cost fields are missing.
ranked_families.expected_source_of_edge: Fresh rolling_quote_window compression-to-expansion movement with low spread burden.
ranked_families.paper_validation_path: Run PAPER-only capture with RUNTIME_V2_POST_SIGNAL_TRAJECTORY=1, LIVE=0, USE_MOCK=0, no seed/fallback/force-open; analyze only natural post_signal_trajectory_v2 rows.
ranked_families.post_signal_target_criteria: p95 signed_net_move ratio >= configured alpha target with best MFE not dominated by cost.
ranked_families.signal_hypothesis: Short-horizon order-flow/quote-window impulse can create post-cost signed movement before spread decay.
ranked_families.stop_risk_ratio_requirements: Require stop_risk telemetry before promotion to execution; fail closed if ratio is missing.

ranked_families.cost_fee_spread_guards: Reject if median estimated_cost exceeds median MFE.
ranked_families.expected_source_of_edge: Rolling quote-window continuation where signed movement persists through 3-5 tick horizons.
fail_closed_conditions: horizon mismatch not explained by telemetry
ranked_families.paper_validation_path: Observe naturally rejected/admitted MomentumV2 candidates in PAPER-only runtime and compare against TrendFollowing baseline.
ranked_families.post_signal_target_criteria: 3/5 tick p95 signed_net_move reaches ratio target without adverse MAE dominance.
ranked_families.signal_hypothesis: Directional continuation after quote-window momentum can exceed fee/spread burden in selected symbol/side buckets.
ranked_families.stop_risk_ratio_requirements: Require expected net to stop-risk ratio telemetry before any runtime gate promotion.

candidate_promotion_criteria: best events repeat across more than one run or timestamp cluster
ranked_families.cost_fee_spread_guards: Reject if max MFE is only marginally above estimated_cost or spread burden is unstable.
ranked_families.expected_source_of_edge: Short horizon reversion after local quote-window extremes, especially sell-side overextension buckets.
ranked_families.paper_validation_path: Focus PAPER observation on best clean near-target symbol/side only after unit sanity remains consistent.
ranked_families.post_signal_target_criteria: h1/h3 signed_net_move p95 reaches ratio target and does not rely on one isolated event.
ranked_families.signal_hypothesis: Quote-window overextension can revert enough to create post-cost signed net movement.
ranked_families.stop_risk_ratio_requirements: Require stop-risk and entry-net-to-stop ratio telemetry for promotion beyond research.

candidate_promotion_criteria: do not promote over non-TrendFollowing unless explicitly requested
ranked_families.cost_fee_spread_guards: Same cost dominance checks as primary families.
ranked_families.paper_validation_path: Keep as baseline in the same PAPER-only post-signal reports.
ranked_families.post_signal_target_criteria: Used to benchmark non-TrendFollowing MFE/net opportunity only.
ranked_families.signal_hypothesis: Baseline directional continuation comparator, not primary stronger-alpha source.
